key_clauses.obligation: Single-location franchise for System and Marks at specified Location
10-year initial term
One 10-year renewal if all conditions met; materially different FA required
5% royalty, 2% digital fee, 6% marketing fund, auto-debit
1.5-mile non-exclusive radius; franchisor retains broad carve-outs
Lease addendum required; lease term >= FA term
Non-exclusive license; all goodwill to franchisor
Marketing Fund, Cooperatives, local advertising, Papa Card, Papa Rewards
Mandatory proprietary IS; unlimited franchisor data access; all data owned by franchisor; upgrades required within 120 days
Compliance with Manuals; operational inspections; quality control
All transfers require consent; ROFR; conditions include compliance, training, current FA, release, $4K fee
9-month assignment deadline; franchisor may appoint manager pending sale
During term: no competing business anywhere. Post-term: 2 years, 10 miles, covers all capacities
Detailed curable (30-day) and non-curable default lists
Avg monthly royalty × lesser of (24, months remaining)
FMV purchase within 15 days, closing within 90 days, excludes goodwill/Marks
Unlimited — hold harmless, defend, indemnify for all claims from construction/operation
AAA in Louisville KY, one arbitrator, individual basis only, no class/consolidated, no punitive damages
Rights to develop specified number of Restaurants in Development Area
Must comply with development schedule; lease/deed 120 days before opening; construction start 90 days before
Default under any FA constitutes cause for DA termination with 15-day cure
Same as FA during term; post-term 2 years within DA or 10 miles of any Papa Johns
Not transferable without consent; governed by same definition as FA

deferred_detail.why_deferred: Operating provisions (equipment, construction, site approval) are substantially covered in Items 7, 8, 10, and 11 of the body. Key contractual provisions (term, fees, termination, transfer, noncompete) extracted.
deferred_detail.remaining_missing: Detailed construction timelines, insurance during development, equipment bill of sale mechanics

key_clauses.obligation: Each owner personally guarantees all of franchisee's debts and obligations to franchisor and affiliates. Joint and several. Unlimited.
No involvement in competing business anywhere during term
2 years, 10 miles of restaurant or any Papa Johns
Must maintain confidentiality of all proprietary information during and after term

exhibits.guaranty_scope_confirmed: Personal guarantee is unlimited and joint/several. Covers all debts and obligations under FA, DA, Equipment Lease, and all other agreements with franchisor and affiliates. No spousal exception noted in the Owner Agreement form.
